title: Barbary White
content:
How death will steal, from life, to claim us all,
    Happy to wrap us in barbary white,
    By tapping ash tight fingers, the steel laws of fate,
    Will deaden our faces, wrapping our feelings from earthly sight.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "Barbary White", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
